prompt: Flat educational illustration on a clean white background, teal and green accents (#0D9488, #059669) with dark brown line work (#2C2926), no text. Concept: a learning journey shown as a rising staircase of five ascending steps, each wider than the last to convey growing capability. Step 1 a small chat prompt bubble, step 2 a recipe/document card, step 3 two linked node figures (orchestrator and sub-agent), step 4 a stacked box/package, step 5 a small factory/chip building reached at the top (company use-case). A subtle upward arrow runs along the staircase. Minimal, friendly, geometric vector style, generous whitespace, no words, no letters, no logos, no brand marks.
